RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Scorching
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] insides are extremely hot (1000°C / 1832°F), any prey inside will be instantly cooked.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Absolute Zero
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] insides are at absolute zero (-273°C / -459°F), prey inside will be frozen solid instantly.
